title: fix: correct grok pricing and add nova-canvas editing
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Nova learns to paint over
gist.blurb: Grok is now cheaper because we like passing savings along, and Nova Canvas finally figured out how to look at an image before painting over it. Image-to-image generation is now live for Nova.
gist.summary: Updated Grok token and video pricing to reflect upstream reductions, and enabled image-to-image variation support for the Nova Canvas model.
gist.impact: Generations with Grok are now significantly cheaper, and developers can pass image inputs to Nova Canvas for AI-powered editing and variations.
gist.visual_concept: Focus on the Nova Canvas image editing feature and the Grok price drop. Polly the bee as a painter working on a digital canvas, while the Monitor Robot holds a discounted price tag.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, happily painting on a glowing digital canvas. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head holds up a green discount price tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
